mapper.select: SELECT s.biz_no AS bizNo, s.style_name AS styleName, s.description AS description, s.prompt_summary AS promptSummary, s.prompt AS prompt, s.scope AS scope, s.publisher_user_id AS publisherUserId, COALESCE(u.nickname, CONCAT('用户', u.biz_no)) AS publisherName, s.price AS price, s.total_uses AS totalUses, s.weekly_uses AS weeklyUses, s.weekly_earnings AS weeklyEarnings, s.milestone_bonus AS milestoneBonus, s.last_settlement_at AS lastSettlementAt, s.created_at AS createdAt FROM u_style_market s LEFT JOIN u_user u ON u.id = s.publisher_user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE s.is_deleted = 0 AND s.enable_status = 1 AND s.audit_status = 1 ORDER BY s.id DESC
